text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's the moment of truth! Time to<n>check the results
of the ticket raffle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HYAAAAAGGGH! I l-l-looost?! I was<n>NOT prepared
for thiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital spends the whole day<n>down in the
dumps after losing a<n>concert ticket raffle.
